title: aphanamixis decandra
intro: Aphanamixis decandra, also known as the Indian laburnum or kathal, is a tree species native to the tropical forests of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Aphanamixis decandra include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Aphanamixis decandra can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and its bark is also used in various traditional remedies.
